style.overall_style: Dark premium food photography with bold typographic discount overlay

design_language.approach: Top-down split — branding and text in upper dark zone, full food spread in lower zone
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Brand name top → discount text center-upper → food spread fills lower 60%
design_language.composition: Two-zone layout: solid black upper block for text, realistic table-scene food photography below
design_language.depth: Strong depth — wooden table surface recedes into background, food items layered at different distances

color_logic.primary_background: Solid black (upper zone) transitioning into deep mahogany/brown wooden table
accent_colors: Red and white striped straw (playful accent)
color_logic.color_emotion: Dark, rich, restaurant-quality feel — black background elevates the food to premium status while warm tones of food create appetite appeal

typography.headline_font_style: Extra bold, wide condensed sans-serif, all caps
typography.headline_size: Extremely large — percentage and OFF text dominate upper frame
typography.supporting_text_style: Medium weight sans-serif, smaller, all caps
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Percentage number largest → OFF large → supporting text medium → brand name small at top
typography.text_case: All caps for promotional text, lowercase for brand name

text_placement.brand_name: Top center, above the discount text

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Lower 55-60% of frame — full pizza on wooden board, centered
graphics_and_image_placement.secondary_products: Garlic bread on plate (upper-left background), cola drink in glass (upper-right background)
graphics_and_image_placement.background: Dark black upper zone, warm dark mahogany wooden table surface lower zone
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: Overhead slightly angled shot — hero pizza centered, supporting items flanking

message_delivery.primary_message: Maximum discount plus free delivery for new users
message_delivery.strategy: Premium food spread signals quality, large discount number signals value — both together create irresistible offer
message_delivery.cta_style: Implicit — brand name at top acts as identity anchor, no direct action text
message_delivery.urgency_level: High — first order exclusivity creates acquisition urgency

style.overall_style: Soft pastel lifestyle photography with bold price-point overlay

design_language.approach: Monochromatic pastel background with product floating in center, text above and below
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Price text dominates upper half, product anchors center, CTA at bottom
design_language.composition: Three-zone vertical: text top → product center → CTA bottom
design_language.depth: Minimal depth — flat pastel background, product sits on matching surface creating seamless look

color_logic.primary_background: Soft blush pink (monochromatic — background and surface same tone)
accent_colors: Chocolate brown (ice cream scoop and drizzle)

text_colors.headline: Pure white — bold and high contrast against pink

color_logic.color_emotion: Pastel pink creates a soft, dessert-appropriate warmth — white text pops cleanly, cherry red creates a focal point accent

typography.headline_size: Price (₹89) is enormous — fills nearly 30% of frame height
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Price largest → headline text medium → CTA and brand name small
typography.text_case: All caps for promotional text, lowercase for brand

text_placement.price_callout: Upper center, immediately below headline — dominant element
text_placement.brand_name: Bottom center, inline with CTA text

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Center frame — ice cream sundae glass centered horizontally, slightly below midpoint vertically
graphics_and_image_placement.background: Flat blush pink — no texture, no gradient
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: Eye-level shot, clean studio-style, product occupies center stage with generous breathing room

message_delivery.primary_message: Extremely low accessible price point for dessert
message_delivery.strategy: Price shock on pastel softness — the juxtaposition of sweet visuals with an unbeatable number drives impulse ordering
message_delivery.cta_style: Explicit — direct order call to action at bottom
message_delivery.urgency_level: Very high — specific low price with asterisk creates scroll-stopping impulse

style.overall_style: Dark dramatic food photography with bold white price-point text

design_language.approach: Dark monochromatic background with product as glowing hero, text above and below
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Price text upper zone → product dominates center → CTA bottom
design_language.composition: Three-zone vertical: text block top → hero food center → CTA strip bottom
design_language.depth: Strong contrast — dark matte background makes food appear to glow and pop forward

color_logic.primary_background: Near-black with warm dark brown fabric/cloth texture visible
accent_colors: Saffron yellow/gold (biryani rice — dominant warm tone)

text_colors.headline: Pure white
text_colors.price: Pure white — maximum contrast against black

color_logic.color_emotion: Dark background creates a theatrical, restaurant-grade presentation — the golden biryani appears to glow, creating intense appetite appeal

typography.headline_size: Price (₹149) is massive — fills approximately 25% of frame height
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Price largest → headline text medium → CTA and brand name equal weight at bottom
typography.text_case: All caps promotional text, lowercase brand name

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Center frame — clay handi pot with biryani, centered horizontally, takes up middle 50% of frame
graphics_and_image_placement.background: Dark near-black with warm brown draped fabric texture
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: Slightly elevated angle, close-up macro on biryani texture, steam and freshness implied through styling

message_delivery.primary_message: Affordable price point for a premium perceived dish
message_delivery.strategy: Cultural resonance — biryani is an aspirational dish in India; pricing it at ₹149 creates perceived value shock
message_delivery.cta_style: Explicit — direct order CTA at bottom
message_delivery.urgency_level: Very high — specific price with asterisk drives immediate action

ads.ad_title: Celebrity Brand Campaign Ad (Shah Rukh Khan — Eating Salad)

style.overall_style: Cinematic celebrity lifestyle campaign, horizontal banner format
style.format: Landscape/Banner format (16:9 or similar horizontal ratio)

design_language.approach: Full-bleed celebrity portrait on brand red, with left-side text overlay
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Headline text left → celebrity face and action right → brand badge below text
design_language.composition: Left-right split — text occupies left third, celebrity occupies right two-thirds
design_language.depth: Flat solid red background — no depth or texture, keeps all focus on person
design_language.border_element: Red pill/badge behind brand name text

color_logic.primary_background: Zomato brand red — solid, flat, full bleed
accent_colors: Red leather jacket (blends with background — creates immersive monochrome effect)
White and green salad/food on plate (contrast anchor)

text_colors.headline: Pure white — bold and high contrast
text_colors.italic_emphasis_word: White italic — typographic variation for emotional emphasis

color_logic.color_emotion: Monochromatic red creates powerful brand recall — celebrity in matching red jacket blurs line between person and brand identity

typography.headline_font_style: Bold sans-serif for main text, italic serif/script for emphasis word — mixed typeface approach
typography.headline_size: Large, takes up significant left-column space
typography.brand_name_style: Lowercase clean sans-serif inside red rounded pill badge
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Headline bold text dominant → italic emphasis word stylistically distinct → brand name small in badge
typography.text_case: Mixed case — sentence case feels conversational and natural

text_placement.primary_headline: Left third of frame, vertically centered
text_placement.italic_emphasis: Last word of headline in italic for typographic drama
text_placement.brand_name: Below headline, left side, inside red rounded pill/badge

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Plate of food held by celebrity at lower-right, partially visible
graphics_and_image_placement.celebrity_image: Right two-thirds of frame — upper body, looking down at food with expressive face
graphics_and_image_placement.human_element: Fully dominant — celebrity is the entire visual story
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: Natural candid-style portrait, celebrity appears mid-action (smelling/eating food)

message_delivery.primary_message: Brand lifestyle affinity — positioning Zomato as part of daily aspirational life
message_delivery.strategy: Humor layered with aspiration — witty copy + beloved celebrity creates emotional brand connection
message_delivery.cta_style: Brand awareness only — no price or discount CTA

style.overall_style: Dark moody overhead food photography with bold discount text overlay and human hands

design_language.approach: Overhead POV food shot with hands holding dish, text overlaid in upper zone
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Discount text block upper center → food and hands dominate center → brand name lower center
design_language.composition: Immersive overhead shot — viewer looks down at food being presented by hands, text floats above
design_language.depth: Dark wooden table background with Persian/ornate rug partially visible at edge — layered texture
design_language.border_element: White rectangular bordered box enclosing the main discount percentage — strong emphasis frame

color_logic.primary_background: Dark brown/mahogany wooden surface with warm undertones
accent_colors: Saffron yellow/gold (biryani rice — dominant warm focal color)
Muted ornate rug pattern at edge (cultural texture element)
color_logic.color_emotion: Dark warm browns evoke tradition and authenticity — golden biryani pops as the emotional and visual center, creating instant hunger response

typography.headline_size: 30% OFF is large and dominant, enclosed in bordered box
typography.supporting_text_style: Medium sans-serif, all caps for condition text
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Percentage largest → OFF large → supporting condition text medium → brand name base
typography.text_case: All caps throughout promotional text, lowercase brand

text_placement.primary_headline: Upper center — 'GRAB THIS OFFER' above the bordered box
text_placement.discount_callout: Upper center inside white bordered rectangle — '30% OFF'
text_placement.condition_text: Inside or below bordered box — order condition

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Center of frame — clay bowl of biryani, viewed from directly overhead, fills center 50%
graphics_and_image_placement.human_hands: Both hands visible from bottom-left and bottom-right, holding/presenting the bowl — creates intimacy and scale
graphics_and_image_placement.background: Dark wooden table with ornate rug edge visible at top-left corner
graphics_and_image_placement.human_element: Partial — both hands holding the dish, framing the food from below
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: Directly overhead (birds-eye) shot, warm moody lighting, hands add human warmth and authenticity

message_delivery.primary_message: Conditional discount offer on orders above threshold
message_delivery.strategy: Overhead hands shot creates a 'being served' sensation — combines cultural food authenticity with strong discount to drive order conversion
message_delivery.cta_style: Implicit — brand name at bottom, no explicit order button text
message_delivery.urgency_level: High — conditional offer with minimum order creates deliberate urgency

consistent_brand_elements: Zomato lowercase logotype in clean sans-serif — always placed at or near bottom
White as universal text color across all 5 ads for maximum contrast
High-quality, professionally styled food photography as primary visual anchor
Portrait/vertical format (4 of 5 ads) optimized for mobile Stories and Feed
Price or discount number always the largest typographic element in promotional ads
Dark backgrounds (black or brand red) used to make food colors pop dramatically
cross_ad_patterns.design_language_summary: Zomato's ads across this set follow two distinct tracks: (1) Dark-background food-hero ads using deep blacks and warm browns to create premium, theatrical food presentation paired with large white price/discount typography; (2) Solid brand-red celebrity lifestyle ads that prioritize emotional connection and brand recall over direct conversion. Both tracks are optimized for mobile-first vertical scroll behavior.
cross_ad_patterns.color_strategy_summary: Three dominant background approaches: solid black (premium/dramatic), solid Zomato red (brand/celebrity), and pastel pink (dessert/soft). Food colors — saffron yellow, tomato red, chocolate brown — are consistently warm and appetite-stimulating. White is the universal text color. Cream/off-white is used for a more premium typographic feel in select ads.
cross_ad_patterns.typography_strategy_summary: All promotional ads feature oversized, bold, condensed sans-serif typography where the price or discount number is always the single largest visual element — designed for instant comprehension at thumb-scroll speed. Brand name is consistently small, lowercase, and placed at the bottom. Celebrity ads use mixed typefaces (bold + italic) for conversational, human tone.
cross_ad_patterns.image_strategy_summary: Food is always styled to maximum appetite appeal — macro close-ups, overhead shots, and eye-level spreads. Human elements (hands holding dishes, celebrity eating) add intimacy and scale. Backgrounds are either completely clean/flat (pastel, black, red) or richly textured (wooden tables, fabric drapes) to evoke authentic dining environments.
cross_ad_patterns.message_delivery_strategy: Clear separation between two campaign objectives: (1) Conversion ads — price or discount dominates, food is secondary validator, CTA is explicit or implicit brand badge; (2) Brand awareness ads — celebrity emotion dominates, product is prop, no price or CTA. Both approaches are designed for maximum thumb-stop impact on mobile social feeds.
recurring_layout_patterns: Three-zone vertical layout: text top → product center → CTA/brand bottom
Bordered box as emphasis frame around discount percentage
Human hands as food presentation device in overhead shots
Monochromatic red environment for celebrity campaigns
Food always occupies minimum 50% of total frame area
